workflows.trigger: Inbound email with claim form or missing document notice
workflows.current_pain: Manual triage delays high-value claims and creates inconsistent follow-up paths.
workflows.delivery_style: no-code first, agentic where it adds leverage, human review where risk rises
workflows.implementation_mode: n8n / low-code orchestration with reusable AI blocks

outputs.name: Claims routing payload
outputs.control_point: Payload must include traceable reason codes.

nodes.name: Context fetch
nodes.control_point: Only approved context sources are queried.

nodes.name: Classify claim intent
nodes.control_point: Confidence threshold below 0.82 routes to manual review.

nodes.name: Draft document request
nodes.control_point: Only approved templates can be used for outbound drafting.

nodes.name: Escalation validation
nodes.control_point: Supervisor approves all high-value or sensitive cases.

nodes.name: Claims routing payload
nodes.control_point: Payload must include traceable reason codes.

nodes.name: Audit trail
nodes.control_point: Every routing and approval event is logged.

workflows.current_pain: Vendor onboarding is slowed down by duplicate checks, missing data and fragmented approvals.
workflows.delivery_style: no-code first, agentic where it adds leverage, human review where risk rises
workflows.implementation_mode: n8n / low-code orchestration with reusable AI blocks

outputs.name: Onboarding decision packet
outputs.control_point: Decision packet must include ownership and next-step SLA.

nodes.name: Context fetch
nodes.control_point: Only approved context sources are queried.

nodes.name: Check completeness and risk flags
nodes.control_point: Risk flags must be explainable for finance review.

nodes.name: Prepare approval summary
nodes.control_point: Summary is restricted to internal stakeholders only.

nodes.name: Finance approval gate
nodes.control_point: Any banking data mismatch requires manual sign-off.

nodes.name: Onboarding decision packet
nodes.control_point: Decision packet must include ownership and next-step SLA.

nodes.name: Audit trail
nodes.control_point: Every routing and approval event is logged.
